form_name: F2S - Create and Update Purchasing Flow for Non-BOM Stocked Materials

questions.text: True or False: In the new NEO process, contracts are created within the MINDS PURCHASING module.
How many source lists are typically required when planning is performed in APO?
options: One for both APO and S4
One for APO and one for S4
One for APO and two for S4
Two for APO and one for S4

questions.text: Explain the primary purpose of a Purchase Info Record (PIR) in the context of NEO.
options: PIRs store the Purchasing Standard Price and are used for connection to APO. They are created automatically upon contract creation.

questions.text: True or False: The standard price is entered within the PIR manually in S4.
options: False (It's entered within MINDS PURCHASING alongside the purchasing price).

questions.text: Where can you view the planned conditions for each validity period of a contract within NEO S4?
options: In the "Item Condition" tab and "Scales" section of the contract display.
